channel.title: The NHS Alliance - News
channel.description: Custom RSS feed for The NHS Alliance news

item.title: Additional funding for NHS Wales welcomed, but whole-system approach needed
item.description: The Welsh NHS Confederation responds to the Welsh Government’s announcement of an extra £145 million for the NHS in Wales as part of Supplementary Budget for 2026 to 2027.

item.title: Joint statement from NI Health and Social Care (HSC) system leaders on Muckamore inquiry findings
item.description: Health and social care leaders in Northern Ireland issue statement in response to the findings of the Muckamore Abbey Hospital Inquiry

item.title: Industrial action will cause "hugely frustrating" delays for patients
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane responds to a warning by NHS England that hot weather and the World Cup could add to pressures posed by resident doctors' industrial action in the coming week.

item.title: Suspension of strikes is a vital chance to reset the conversation
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane comments on the BMA's decision to suspend the upcoming strikes.

item.title: Demand rises across the NHS as leaders work hard to treat patients and tackle corridor care
item.description: Matthew Hopkins responds to latest NHS performance figures.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to the publication of the National Oversight Framework
item.description: David Williams says NHS leaders welcome the confirmation of how their organisations will be assessed and overseen in 2026/27.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to James Murray's speech at NHS Confed Expo
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane responds to the health secretary's speech at NHS Confed Expo

item.title: Urgent action needed to protect NHS staff amid rising harassment, discrimination and abuse
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane, the new chief executive of The NHS Alliance, has warned that staff from diverse backgrounds feel particularly under threat at present.

item.title: The NHS Alliance response to Sir Jim Mackey at NHS ConfedExpo
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane responds to Sir Jim Mackey's speech at NHS ConfedExpo.

item.title: The Single Patient Record: Keep an eye on the prize
item.description: Sir Ciarán Devane calls for a constructive debate on the Single Patient Record, recognising its potential to transform care for patients.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to recommendations to tackle antisemitism and other forms of racism in NHS
item.description: Rebecca Gray says it is vital that Jewish staff and patients are provided with the respect and dignity we all deserve

item.title: NHS leaders welcome new government's health & care priorities and stand ready to play their part
item.description: The Welsh NHS Confederation responds to the Cabinet Minister for Health and Care's first statement on health and care priorities.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to government announcement on expansion of pharmacy services
item.description: Ruth Rankine says the rollout of independent prescribing is a crucial step in unlocking the full expertise and community reach of pharmacies.

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to Milburn review findings
item.description: Rebecca Gray responds to findings from Alan MIlburn's review into the increase in the number of young people who are Not in Education Employment or Training (NEET).

item.title: The NHS Alliance responds to announcement of first six advanced foundation trusts
item.description: Dr Layla McCay responds to NHS England's announcement on the first six advanced foundation trusts.

item.title: The NHS Alliance comments on resident doctors strike in June
item.description: Matthew Hopkins says decision to strike yet again is rash and wholly irresponsible and will leave patients paying the price.

item.title: NHS leaders committed to working with new Welsh Government to deliver improvements
item.description: The Welsh NHS Confederation responds to the latest NHS Wales activity and performance statistics - the first with a new Welsh Government.

item.title: Welsh NHS Confederation launches glossary to improve understanding of health and care terminology
NHS leaders welcome whole-government approach to improving health in Wales
item.description: Director of the Welsh NHS Confederation Darren Hughes responds to the First Minister's priorities for the new Welsh Government.

item.title: The NHS Alliance comments on RCN mental health findings
item.description: Rebecca Gray responds to findings from the Royal College of Nursing on children in a mental health crisis in A&E.
